refined_caption: There is water on the hospital floor and a person is falling. The floor appears to be slippery due to the water.
complaint_description: I was walking down the hospital floor when I saw a large puddle of water that seemed to be causing a slipping hazard. A man nearby lost his balance and fell, and I'm worried someone else might get hurt. The hospital staff should clean up the spill immediately to prevent any further accidents.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor and someone just slipped and fell, can someone please clean this up?
